title: The unreasonable effectiveness of early discarding after one epoch in neural network hyperparameter optimization
search_query: The unreasonable effectiveness of early discarding after one epoch in neural network hyperparameter optimization
notes: To reach high performance with deep learning, hyperparameter optimization (HPO) is essential. This process is usually time-consuming due to costly evaluations of neural networks. Early discarding techniques limit the resources granted to unpromising candidates by observing the em...
